desc: Read these first. Each one changes how you read everything else.

books.title: The Structure of Scientific Revolutions
books.author: Thomas Kuhn
books.note: Makes every other book's claims legible. Short (200p).

books.title: Thinking in Systems
books.author: Donella Meadows
books.note: Practical systems lens. Unlocks GEB, Wolfram, Bohm at depth.

books.title: Influence
books.author: Robert Cialdini
books.note: Foundation under all Hormozi. Read before 100M Leads.

desc: Entry point into each domain. Pick your cluster, start here.

books.title: Being You
books.author: Anil Seth
books.note: Best entry into consciousness. Accessible, rigorous.

books.title: Complexity: A Guided Tour
books.author: Melanie Mitchell
books.note: Entry into systems/complexity before GEB.

books.title: How to Change Your Mind
books.author: Michael Pollan
books.note: Best entry into psychedelics cluster. Journalistic, grounded.

books.title: 100M Offers
books.author: Alex Hormozi
books.note: Entry into business cluster. Read before 100M Leads.

books.title: The Kybalion
books.author: Three Initiates
books.note: Entry into esoteric. Short. Mental models for the cluster.

books.title: The Telomere Effect
books.author: Blackburn & Epel
books.note: Standalone. Read whenever.

desc: Requires Tier 1 of same cluster. The real payload.

books.title: The Ego Tunnel
books.author: Thomas Metzinger
books.note: After: Being You. Hardest consciousness book. Most important.

books.title: Galileo's Error
books.author: Philip Goff
books.note: After: Being You. Panpsychism argument — read alongside Metzinger.

books.title: Surfing Uncertainty
books.author: Andy Clark
books.note: After: Being You. Predictive processing — dense, foundational.

books.title: The Mind Illuminated
books.author: Culadasa
books.note: After: How to Change Your Mind. Practice manual for meditation.

books.title: Gödel, Escher, Bach
books.author: Douglas Hofstadter
books.note: After: Complexity. The monument. Takes time.

books.title: Wholeness & the Implicate Order
books.author: David Bohm
books.note: After: Complexity + Thinking in Systems. Dense physics/philosophy.

books.title: DMT Dialogues
books.author: David Luke et al.
books.note: After: How to Change Your Mind.

books.title: Entangled Minds
books.author: Dean Radin
books.note: After: DMT Dialogues. Psi research, quantum framing.

books.title: 100M Leads
books.author: Alex Hormozi
books.note: After: Influence + 100M Offers.

books.title: The Science Delusion
books.author: Rupert Sheldrake
books.note: After: The Kybalion. Challenges scientific dogma directly.

desc: Requires Tier 2. High cognitive load. High payoff.

books.title: The Case Against Reality
books.author: Donald Hoffman
books.note: After: Ego Tunnel + Galileo's Error. Most radical consciousness thesis.

books.title: Consciousness Beyond Life
books.author: Pim van Lommel
books.note: After: Ego Tunnel. NDE data — empirical edge case for consciousness.

books.title: I Am a Strange Loop
books.author: Douglas Hofstadter
books.note: After: GEB. Distills GEB's core — more readable, equally deep.

books.title: A New Kind of Science
books.author: Stephen Wolfram
books.note: After: GEB + Thinking in Systems. Dense. Skim strategically.

books.title: Prometheus Rising
books.author: Robert Anton Wilson
books.note: After: Tier 1 of all clusters. Makes every book you own talk to each other.

books.title: Psicobiofísica (Vol. 1–4)
books.author: Jacobo Grinberg-Zylberbaum
books.note: Mexican neuroscientist. Brain fields, consciousness, psi. Pairs with Entangled Minds.

books.title: La teoría sintérgica
books.author: Jacobo Grinberg-Zylberbaum
books.note: His core theoretical framework — syntergy, neuronal fields, reality construction.

books.title: El espacio de la conciencia
books.author: Jacobo Grinberg-Zylberbaum
books.note: Bridges indigenous Mexican traditions + neuroscience. After Psicobiofísica.

desc: Read last. These recontextualize everything above.

books.title: Steps to an Ecology of Mind
books.author: Gregory Bateson
books.note: After: everything. Connects cybernetics, consciousness, biology, language.

desc: Applied books to pull in when the work demands them.

books.title: Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs (JavaScript Adaptation)
books.author: Harold Abelson, Gerald Jay Sussman & Julie Sussman

books.title: The Art of Strategy
books.author: Avinash K. Dixit & Barry J. Nalebuff

books.title: How to Win Friends and Influence People in the Digital Age
books.author: Dale Carnegie & Associates

desc: Adjacent lenses on consciousness, judgment, meaning, and coordination.

books.title: Why? The Purpose of the Universe
books.author: Philip Goff

books.title: The Secret Teachings of All Ages
books.author: Manly P. Hall

books.title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
books.author: Mark Manson

books.title: 101 Essays That Will Change the Way You Think
books.author: Brianna Wiest

desc: Standalone novels and long-form stories in the library.

books.title: The Complete Works of William Shakespeare
books.author: William Shakespeare

books.title: I Had That Same Dream Again
books.author: Yoru Sumino

books.title: Albert Camus's The Stranger: Critical Essays
books.author: Peter Francev

desc: Series are represented once, regardless of how many volumes are present.

books.title: My Youth Romantic Comedy Is Wrong, As I Expected
books.author: Wataru Watari

books.title: The Empty Box and Zeroth Maria
books.author: Eiji Mikage

books.title: The Girl I Like Forgot Her Glasses
books.author: Koume Fujichika

books.title: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten
books.author: Saekisan
